changeSet.author: jhipster
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE pass_contract ADD COLUMN search_vector tsvector GENERATED ALWAYS AS ( setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(TITLE, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(DESCRIPTION, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(AGENCY, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(AGENCY_NAME, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(AGENCY_ACRONYM, '')), 'B') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(SUPPLIER, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(COMMODITYDESCRIPTION, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(CONTRACTNUMBER, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(CONTRACTTYPEDESCRIPTION, '')), 'B') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(PROCUREMENTMETHODDESCRIPTION, '')), 'B') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(CONTRACTINGOFFICER, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(CONTRACTADMINISTRATORNAME, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(CONTRACTADMINISTRATOREMAIL, '')), 'B') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(CORPORATEEMAILADDRESS, '')), 'B') ) STORED;
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE pass_contract DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS search_vector;

changeSet.author: jhipster
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_pass_contract_search_vector_gin ON pass_contract USING GIN (search_vector);

changeSet.author: jhipster
changeSet.rollback: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS pass_contract_fts_match(tsvector, text);

changeSet.author: jhipster
changeSet.rollback: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS pass_contract_fts_rank(tsvector, text);
